hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】战略、贝莱德组建比特币安全联盟，为应对量子计算威胁做好准备；【CRYPTO】Flow Traders 试点 Lombard 的新的比特币支持的稳定币借贷信贷策略；【AI】将 2D 设计转变为 3D 模型以进行快速原型设计的更好方法。

items.title: Strategy, BlackRock form Bitcoin Security Consortium to prepare for quantum computing threat
items.summary: Nine firms including Strategy and BlackRock formed a $15 million Bitcoin security consortium to fund post-quantum cryptography research.
items.title_zh: 战略、贝莱德组建比特币安全联盟，为应对量子计算威胁做好准备
items.summary_zh: Strategy 和 BlackRock 等 9 家公司组建了价值 1500 万美元的比特币安全联盟，为后量子密码学研究提供资金。

items.title: Flow Traders pilots Lombard’s new bitcoin-backed credit strategy for stablecoin borrowing
items.summary: Lombard Finance is launching its Bitcoin Onchain Credit Strategy with Flow Traders as the pilot partner.
items.title_zh: Flow Traders 试点 Lombard 的新的比特币支持的稳定币借贷信贷策略
items.summary_zh: Lombard Finance 正在推出比特币链上信贷战略，Flow Traders 作为试点合作伙伴。

items.title: A better way to turn 2D designs into 3D models for rapid prototyping
items.summary: Researchers developed an automated framework that helps AI models generate CAD programs more accurately and efficiently.
items.title_zh: 将 2D 设计转变为 3D 模型以进行快速原型设计的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一个自动化框架，帮助 AI 模型更准确、更高效地生成 CAD 程序。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Attacks in Red Sea Send Oil Prices Over $100 a Barrel
items.summary: The price of Brent crude soared after Iran’s Houthi allies in Yemen claimed strikes on two Saudi tankers. The House cast a second vote to rein in President Trump’s war powers, with four Republicans joining Democrats to rebuke the president.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：红海袭击导致油价超过每桶 100 美元
items.summary_zh: 在伊朗在也门的胡塞盟友声称袭击了两艘沙特油轮后，布伦特原油价格飙升。众议院进行了第二次投票，以限制特朗普总统的战争权力，四名共和党人与民主党人一起谴责总统。

items.title: BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy in a new group pledging $15 million to prepare Bitcoin for quantum threats
items.summary: Members will direct funding independently, with the consortium taking no role in Bitcoin governance or protocol decisions.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德、Coinbase、Strategy 成立新团队，承诺投入 1500 万美元，为比特币应对量子威胁做好准备
items.summary_zh: 成员将独立指导资金，该联盟在比特币治理或协议决策中不发挥任何作用。

items.title: LayerZero, Keeta enable tokenized bank deposits across Ethereum, Solana and Base
items.summary: LayerZero and Keeta have partnered to enable native transfers of tokenized bank deposits across Ethereum, Solana, Base, and Keeta.
items.title_zh: LayerZero、Keeta 支持以太坊、Solana 和 Base 上的代币化银行存款
items.summary_zh: LayerZero 和 Keeta 合作，实现代币化银行存款在以太坊、Solana、Base 和 Keeta 之间的本地转账。

items.title: Circle partners with Kakao, Toss Bank to explore stablecoin payment rails in South Korea
items.summary: Circle plans to explore blockchain-based payment infrastructure in South Korea through partnerships with Kakao and Toss.
items.title_zh: Circle 与 Kakao、Toss Bank 合作探索韩国稳定币支付轨道
items.summary_zh: Circle 计划通过与 Kakao 和 Toss 合作，在韩国探索基于区块链的支付基础设施。

items.title: John Paulson says we are in the early stages of a long-term bull market for gold
items.summary: He said demand for bullion continues to broaden, led by central banks that have been adding to their reserves alongside growing private-sector interest.
items.title_zh: 约翰·保尔森表示，我们正处于黄金长期牛市的早期阶段
items.summary_zh: 他表示，在各国央行不断增加储备以及私营部门兴趣不断增长的带动下，对金条的需求持续扩大。

items.title: Bets against SpaceX grow to 32% of float as Elon Musk warns short sellers won't survive
items.summary: About 206 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 32% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克警告卖空者将无法生存，做空 SpaceX 的押注增至流通股的 32%
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 称，目前约有 2.06 亿股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占该公司可公开交易流通股的 32%。

items.title: As the U.S.-Iran war heats up again, these parts of the stock market and economy could be affected
items.summary: Investors and economists are deliberating what the latest exchange in hostilities will mean for the broader economy.
items.title_zh: 美伊战争再度升温，股市和经济这些部分可能受到影响
items.summary_zh: 投资者和经济学家正在考虑最新的敌对行动对整体经济意味着什么。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
items.summary: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.
items.title_zh: 杰米戴蒙表示市场低估了风险，他不会以当前价格购买股票或国债
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙的言论与投资者最近愿意忽视战争、关税和其他冲击的态度形成鲜明对比。

items.title: Capital One bet big on Discover. Now it must prove the gamble was worth it
items.summary: Tuesday evening's second-quarter earnings report is the perfect stage to do just that.
items.title_zh: 第一资本在 Discover 上下了大赌注。现在必须证明这场赌博是值得的
items.summary_zh: 周二晚上的第二季度收益报告是实现这一目标的完美舞台。

items.title: Coinbase trading results may fall short of expectations, according to prediction markets
items.summary: Speculators think in the company's second quarter earnings report, it will show trading volume fell for a third consecutive quarter.
items.title_zh: 市场预测称Coinbase交易结果可能达不到预期
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为，在该公司第二季度财报中，将显示交易量连续第三个季度下降。

items.title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
items.summary: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场利用世界杯，Kalshi 增加了 300 万新用户
items.summary_zh: 预测市场推出了一些以足球运动员为主角的广告，并建立了合作伙伴关系，在比赛期间在更多地方展示其品牌。

items.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
items.summary: The price of Brent crude rose more than 6% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.
items.title_zh: 油价自5月以来首次触及100美元
items.summary_zh: 随着中东战事持续升级，布伦特原油价格周四上涨逾6%。

items.title: Oil-Rich Saudi Arabia Isn’t Short on Energy. Here’s Why It Wants to Go Nuclear.
items.summary: Opponents warn that a U.S.-Saudi deal could be a step toward the kingdom building an atomic bomb. But there are other reasons for the world’s largest oil exporter to diversify its energy mix.
items.title_zh: 石油资源丰富的沙特阿拉伯并不缺乏能源。这就是它想要发展核能的原因。
items.summary_zh: 反对者警告说，美国与沙特的协议可能是沙特朝着制造原子弹迈出的一步。但世界最大石油出口国实现能源结构多元化还有其他原因。

items.title: Why I Sought Out a Taliban Commander I Had Fought
items.summary: First as a Marine and then as a journalist, I spent years tied to Afghanistan. I returned one last time to speak to a former enemy in search of answers, and perhaps closure.
items.title_zh: 为什么我要去找一位曾与我战斗过的塔利班指挥官
items.summary_zh: 首先作为一名海军陆战队员，然后作为一名记者，我花了很多年与阿富汗联系在一起。我最后一次回来与一位昔日的敌人交谈，寻找答案，或许还有一个结局。

items.title: A New Target for Ukraine’s Long-Range Attacks: Russia’s Version of Amazon
items.summary: Kyiv is escalating its air war by striking commercial warehouses, trying to bring the conflict closer to home for ordinary Russians.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰远程攻击的新目标：俄罗斯版亚马逊
items.summary_zh: 基辅正在通过袭击商业仓库来升级空战，试图让冲突离普通俄罗斯人的家更近。

items.title: Zelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn Is the Latest Zigzag in a Presidency Full of Them
items.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine has pivoted from unpopular moves before, but a recent decision about military leadership and strategy could weaken his position.
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基令人眼花缭乱的大转变是总统任期内最新的曲折
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基此前曾采取不受欢迎的举措，但最近关于军事领导和战略的决定可能会削弱他的地位。

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs Clarity Act despite banking industry's concerns over stablecoin rules
items.summary: The Goldman Sachs CEO said the crypto market structure bill would create a more stable regulatory framework, breaking with other major bank leaders who oppose key stablecoin provisions.
items.title_zh: 尽管银行业对稳定币规则感到担忧，高盛首席执行官还是支持《清晰法案》
items.summary_zh: 高盛首席执行官表示，加密货币市场结构法案将创建一个更稳定的监管框架，与其他反对关键稳定币条款的主要银行领导人不同。

items.title: BitMEX to shut down permanently 11 years after Arthur Hayes co-founded crypto exchange
items.summary: BitMEX, co-founded by Arthur Hayes, will shut down on Sept. 23, 2026, at 04:00 UTC after owner HDR Global Trading's strategic review.
items.title_zh: Arthur Hayes 共同创立加密货币交易所 11 年后，BitMEX 将永久关闭
items.summary_zh: BitMEX 由 Arthur Hayes 联合创立，在所有者 HDR Global Trading 进行战略审查后，将于世界标准时间 2026 年 9 月 23 日 04:00 关闭。

items.title: Advancing the next era of national science
items.summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.
items.title_zh: 推进国家科学的下一个时代
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了其与美国能源部和国家实验室合作推进美国科学发展的承诺，利用前沿人工智能加速发现。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Helping AI models to meet the real world
items.summary: Through research and entrepreneurship, Professor Devavrat Shah is helping to design methods that can handle constant decision-making using limited computational resources.
items.title_zh: 帮助AI模型满足现实世界
items.summary_zh: 通过研究和创业，Devavrat Shah 教授正在帮助设计能够使用有限的计算资源处理持续决策的方法。

items.title: Kalshi launches election hub for prediction markets ahead of midterms
items.summary: The company said the page gives viewers of its event contracts a central place to see speculators' outlook for the midterm elections.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希在中期选举前推出预测市场选举中心
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示，该页面为其活动合约的查看者提供了一个了解投机者对中期选举前景的中心位置。

items.title: Goldman Sachs creates private markets platform as rich investors seek the next SpaceX and Stripe
items.summary: Goldman Sachs is launching a new alternative investments platform aimed at giving wealthy clients and family offices direct stakes in private companies.
items.title_zh: 高盛创建私募市场平台，富有投资者寻求下一个 SpaceX 和 Stripe
items.summary_zh: 高盛正在推出一个新的另类投资平台，旨在让富裕客户和家族办公室直接持有私营公司的股份。

items.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
items.summary: The Iran-backed group, which previously announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia, also claims to have hit another vessel.
items.title_zh: 随着美国对伊朗发动更多打击，也门胡塞武装袭击了沙特油轮
items.summary_zh: 该伊朗支持的组织此前宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”，还声称袭击了另一艘船只。

items.title: The SEC settles with Coinbase over its missing Gary Gensler texts
items.summary: A new court status report reveals the agency will pay a flat fee to resolve a two-year fight over what former Chair Gary Gensler knew about Ethereum.
items.title_zh: SEC 与 Coinbase 就其丢失的 Gary Gensler 文本达成和解
items.summary_zh: 一份新的法院状态报告显示，该机构将支付一笔固定费用，以解决围绕前主席加里·詹斯勒 (Gary Gensler) 对以太坊了解程度的两年之争。

items.title: Bulls face a test unlike anything in bitcoin's 17-year history
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 23, 2026
items.title_zh: 多头面临比特币 17 年历史上从未有过的考验
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 23 日天气预报

items.title: Crypto catches its breath as bitcoin settles into a holding pattern amid July rally
items.summary: BTC is rangebound between $64,000 and $66,800 after a 13% recovery from July's lows, with macro markets offering little direction and WLFI the session's surprise standout at +12%.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币在 7 月反弹中进入持有模式，加密货币喘了口气
items.summary_zh: BTC 从 7 月低点反弹 13% 后，在 64,000 美元至 66,800 美元之间波动，宏观市场几乎没有提供任何方向，而 WLFI 当天的表现出人意料地上涨了 12%。

items.title: ‘Not currently the right capital solution’: Smarter Web sells 178 bitcoin to repay $11.7M convertible instrument
items.summary: The Smarter Web Company sold 177.89 BTC at $65,762 to repay $11.7 million to TOBAM early, cancelling 7.7 million in potential share issuance.
items.title_zh: “目前不是正确的资本解决方案”：Smarter Web 出售 178 比特币以偿还 1170 万美元的可转换工具
items.summary_zh: Smarter Web 公司以 65,762 美元的价格出售了 177.89 BTC，提前向 TOBAM 偿还 1170 万美元，取消了 770 万股潜在的股票发行。

items.title: New Verus-Ethereum bridge attack drains $7.5 million through flaw used in May: Blockaid
items.summary: A second Verus-Ethereum bridge exploit in two months drained $7.54 million through the same vulnerability class used in May, per Blockaid.
items.title_zh: 新的 Verus-Ethereum 桥接攻击因 5 月份使用的缺陷而损失了 750 万美元：Blockaid
items.summary_zh: 根据 Blockaid 的数据，两个月内第二次 Verus-Ethereum 桥漏洞利用与 5 月份使用的相同漏洞类别损失了 754 万美元。

items.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
items.summary: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.
items.title_zh: 推出适用于小型企业的 ChatGPT 计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT for Small Businesses 计划，帮助企业家培养 AI 技能、自动化工作并与 ChatGPT Work 一起成长。

items.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
items.summary: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 与 Hugging Face 合作解决模型评估期间的安全事件
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Hugging Face 分享了人工智能模型评估期间安全事件的早期发现，强调了先进的网络功能和防御者的经验教训。

items.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
items.summary: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
items.title_zh: 长视野模型时代的安全性和对准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 分享了部署长期运行的人工智能模型的经验教训，强调了新的安全风险、观察到的故障以及通过迭代部署改进的保障措施。

items.title_zh: 更新型号，同样的优势

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
items.title_zh: 模型路由很简单。直到它不是。

items.title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
items.summary: We shared how Samsung users can boost productivity and get time back on new foldables, watches, and glasses coming soon.
items.title_zh: Galaxy Unpacked 2026 的 3 项 Google 更新
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了三星用户如何提高工作效率并节省时间购买即将推出的新款可折叠设备、手表和眼镜。

items.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
items.summary: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.

items.summary_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Google Vids 中的个人头像让视频创作变得比以往更容易。

items.title: MIT projects selected for funding under US Department of Energy’s Genesis Mission
items.summary: Initial research projects advance national priorities across natural resources, manufacturing, nuclear physics, and more.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的项目被选为美国能源部创世任务资助的项目
items.summary_zh: 初步研究项目推进了自然资源、制造业、核物理等方面的国家优先事项。

items.title: China's car market heads for worst year since 2021 as sales plunge 20%
items.summary: Consumer demand for cars in China tumbles following record-high sales of 23.7 million units in 2025.
items.title_zh: 中国汽车市场将迎来2021年以来最糟糕的一年销量暴跌20%
items.summary_zh: 继 2025 年销量创历史新高 2370 万辆之后，中国消费者对汽车的需求大幅下降。

items.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，沙特必须承认以色列的核协议
items.summary_zh: 美国总统表示，帮助沙特发展核能的里程碑式协议取决于其加入《亚伯拉罕协议》。

items.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
items.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region.
items.title_zh: 野火在西南部蔓延 法国疏散2万人
items.summary_zh: 大多数被疏散的人是来自法国吉伦特省阿卡雄湾周围露营地的游客。

items.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
items.summary: Sonam Wangchuk has been the main draw at the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest in Delhi.
items.title_zh: “我还活着”：绝食26天的印度活动人士减重11公斤
items.summary_zh: 索南·旺楚克 (Sonam Wangchuk) 一直是德里蟑螂简塔党 (CJP) 抗议活动的主角。

items.title: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
items.summary: Canada's dairy supply management system is in the spotlight after the US president singled it out as one of three main irritants used to justify new tariffs.
items.title_zh: 加拿大“强大”的乳制品行业成为特朗普的贸易瞄准目标
items.summary_zh: 在美国总统将加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统列为证明新关税合理性的三大主要刺激因素之一后，加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统成为人们关注的焦点。

items.title: Nicaragua's legislature debates barring opposition from elections
items.summary: The move comes days after President Daniel Ortega demanded 'a wall, a blockade' against opposition parties.
items.title_zh: 尼加拉瓜立法机构辩论禁止反对派参加选举
items.summary_zh: 几天前，总统丹尼尔·奥尔特加要求对反对党“建墙、封锁”。

items.title: Ex-governor convicted of murdering a pregnant student in Kenya
items.summary: Okoth Obado was found guilty of killing Sharon Otieno with whom he had had an affair.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚前州长因谋杀一名怀孕学生而被定罪
items.summary_zh: 奥科斯·奥巴多因杀害与他有染的莎朗·奥蒂诺而被判有罪。

items.title: 'Let's enjoy the ride' says Elon Musk, as AI fears mount
items.summary: Talking to The Economist, Musk said he doesn't care if people hate him and said he was not a racist.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能的恐惧加剧，埃隆·马斯克说：“让我们享受这段旅程吧”
items.summary_zh: 马斯克在接受《经济学人》采访时表示，他不在乎人们是否讨厌他，并表示他不是种族主义者。

items.title: South Korea woman acquitted of murdering newborn after hospital delivery
items.summary: The woman, who had wanted to end her pregnancy at 36 weeks, gave birth to a baby who doctors later killed.
items.title_zh: 韩国妇女在医院分娩后谋杀新生儿被判无罪
items.summary_zh: 这名妇女原本想在怀孕36周时终止妊娠，但生下的婴儿后来被医生杀死。

items.title: ‘We Will All Die From Ebola Here’: Virus Stalks Crowded Camps in Congo
items.summary: There are a million people displaced by violence in the epicenter. They live in dangerous conditions and are fighting the virus with very little clean water.
items.title_zh: “我们都会死于埃博拉病毒”：病毒在刚果拥挤的营地中蔓延
items.summary_zh: 震中地区有一百万人因暴力事件而流离失所。他们生活在危险的条件下，仅靠很少的干净水来对抗病毒。

items.title: For South Korea, U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Exposes a Double Standard
items.summary: President Trump has put Saudi Arabia on the path to enriching uranium on its own soil, a demand South Korea has been making for years.
items.title_zh: 对于韩国来说，美国与沙特的核协议暴露了双重标准
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统已让沙特阿拉伯走上在自己的土地上进行铀浓缩的道路，这是韩国多年来一直提出的要求。

items.title: U.S. Military Presence in Jordan Makes It Iranian Target
items.summary: Relying heavily on U.S. aid and protection, Jordan is unlikely to restrict the American military presence there, despite escalating Iranian airstrikes.
items.title_zh: 美国在约旦的军事存在使其成为伊朗的目标
items.summary_zh: 尽管伊朗空袭不断升级，但严重依赖美国的援助和保护的约旦不太可能限制美国在那里的军事存在。

items.title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
items.summary: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.
items.title_zh: 突然成为焦点的俄罗斯间谍逃离日本
items.summary_zh: 在《泰晤士报》报道称这名军事情报官员利用俄罗斯航空公司驻东京办事处进行间谍活动后，他离开了该国。

items.title: U.S.-Saudi Deal Prompts Fears of a Global Nuclear Arms Race
items.summary: In Europe, Asia and the Middle East, countries seek nuclear capabilities to hedge against aggressive neighbors and a receding Washington, potentially creating a more freewheeling era.
items.title_zh: 美国与沙特的协议引发了对全球核军备竞赛的担忧
items.summary_zh: 在欧洲、亚洲和中东，各国寻求核能力来对抗好斗的邻国和后退的华盛顿，这有可能创造一个更加随心所欲的时代。

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: It’s time for tokenization to get to work
items.title_zh: 顾问的加密货币：是时候让代币化发挥作用了

items.title: Uniswap pushes deeper into tokenized assets with permissioned trading pools
items.summary: The framework, developed with Superstate, Securitize and Dowgo, lets regulated funds and securities trade on Uniswap while enforcing compliance rules necessary for institutions.
items.title_zh: Uniswap 通过许可交易池更深入地推进代币化资产
items.summary_zh: 该框架由 Superstate、Securitize 和 Dowgo 共同开发，允许受监管的基金和证券在 Uniswap 上进行交易，同时执行机构所需的合规规则。

items.title: The KIDS Act is way worse than digital carding — it is a mass surveillance system
items.summary: The fact that lawmakers are even contemplating a bill that would create a surveillance and censorship regime should be a wake-up call for everyone who values privacy and free expression, argues Electronic Frontier Foundation's India McKinney.
items.title_zh: 《儿童法案》比数字卡片更糟糕——它是一个大规模监控系统
items.summary_zh: 电子前沿基金会的印度麦金尼认为，立法者甚至正在考虑一项建立监视和审查制度的法案，这一事实应该为所有重视隐私和言论自由的人敲响警钟。

items.title: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital joins tokenization push as Coinbase takes stake in onchain fund
items.summary: The sovereign wealth-backed asset manager tapped KAIO to bring one of its private market funds onchain across Base, Solana and Sui networks.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 入股链上基金，阿布扎比 Mubadala Capital 加入代币化进程
items.summary_zh: 这家主权财富支持的资产管理公司利用 KAIO 将其一只私募市场基金引入 Base、Solana 和 Sui 网络的链上。

items.title: Polymarket to challenge France’s nationwide website block
items.summary: France’s regulator has said the platform still promoted illegal gambling and cited loss, identity-check and market-manipulation risks.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 挑战法国全国网站封锁
items.summary_zh: 法国监管机构表示，该平台仍然宣扬非法赌博，并指出存在损失、身份检查和市场操纵风险。

items.title: Coinbase calls AI payments its ‘most high-conviction bet’ as businesses begin accepting agent payments
items.summary: Coinbase will enable businesses to accept payments from AI bots, powered by Coinbase Payments and the x402 standard.
items.title_zh: 随着企业开始接受代理付款，Coinbase 将人工智能支付称为“最令人信服的赌注”
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 将使企业能够接受由 Coinbase Payments 和 x402 标准提供支持的人工智能机器人的付款。

items.title: Proof of Reserves: What It Means for Exchange Trust
items.summary: The Trust Deficit For most of the crypto industry’s history, users who deposited assets with an exchange simply trusted that the funds were there. FTX ended that complacency when it collapsed in 2022, with investigators finding that billions in customer deposits had been quietly
items.title_zh: 储备证明：对交易所信任意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 信任赤字 在加密货币行业的大部分历史中，在交易所存入资产的用户只是相信资金就在那里。 FTX 在 2022 年倒闭后结束了这种自满情绪，调查人员发现数十亿客户存款已悄然被盗

items.title: South Korea’s Mirae Asset completes acquisition of Korbit crypto exchange
items.summary: Mirae Asset also plans to increase its stake from 92.06% to 97.15% through an additional deal later this week, local media reported.
items.title_zh: 韩国 Mirae Asset 完成对 Korbit 加密货币交易所的收购
items.summary_zh: 据当地媒体报道，未来资产还计划在本周晚些时候通过额外交易将其持股比例从 92.06% 增加至 97.15%。

items.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
items.summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
items.title_zh: 与埃芬汉县社区一起建设人工智能基础设施
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布在佐治亚州埃芬汉县推出 Camellia 项目，承诺提供负责任的能源、社区投资、就业机会和获取 Codex 的机会。

items.title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
items.summary: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.
items.title_zh: 新闻机构如何利用人工智能来推进其重要使命
items.summary_zh: 新闻机构正在利用人工智能来加强报道、扩大受众并改善业务运营，并通过 OpenAI 工具为全球记者和出版商提供支持。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
items.summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 OpenAI Presence，这是一个经过验证的企业 AI 代理平台，可帮助组织为客户和内部工作流程部署可信的语音和聊天代理。

items.title: NTT DATA Group cuts incident analysis to 30 minutes with Codex
items.summary: NTT DATA Group uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to help 9,000 employees automate work, cut incident analysis to 30 minutes, and scale secure AI adoption.
items.title_zh: NTT DATA Group 通过 Codex 将事件分析时间缩短至 30 分钟
items.summary_zh: NTT DATA Group 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 帮助 9,000 名员工实现工作自动化，将事件分析时间缩短至 30 分钟，并扩大安全 AI 的采用。

items.title: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC
items.summary: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.
items.title_zh: David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会和 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会
items.summary_zh: David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会和 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会，在金融、技术和治理方面发挥全球领导作用。

items.title: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
items.title_zh: 人工智能时代的记分卡
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 推出了实用的 AI 记分卡，通过有用的工作、每项成功任务的成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量投资回报率。

items.title: Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
items.title_zh: 将 Nunchaku 4 位扩散推理引入扩散器

items.title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
items.title_zh: 物理 AI 仿真现状：概述

items.title: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
items.title_zh: Grabette：记录机器人操作数据的开放系统

items.title: Security incident disclosure — July 2026
items.title_zh: 安全事件披露 — 2026 年 7 月

items.title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
items.title_zh: Shippy 的建造教会了我们关于建筑代理的哪些知识

items.title: Welcome Inkling by Thinking Machines
items.title_zh: 欢迎来自 Thinking Machine 的 Inkling

items.title: Introducing Real World VoiceEQ: Measuring the human quality of voice AI
items.title_zh: 真实世界 VoiceEQ 简介：测量语音 AI 的人类质量

items.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 3): Attention is all you profile
items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 3 部分）：注意力就是您的分析

items.title: Connect more of your apps to Search
items.summary: You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode.
items.title_zh: 将更多应用程序连接到搜索
items.summary_zh: 您将能够直接在 AI 模式下安全地链接您的首选服务并与之交互。

items.title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
items.summary: Google Images is turning 25. Here’s a look back at some major milestones — and new ways to explore and create visual content.
items.title_zh: 庆祝视觉搜索创新 25 周年
items.summary_zh: Google 图片即将迎来 25 岁生日。以下是一些重要里程碑的回顾，以及探索和创建视觉内容的新方法。

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: Professor Emeritus Dimitri Bertsekas, influential computer scientist and prolific author, dies at 83
items.summary: Known for his clear and elegant writing style, Bertsekas shaped fields from control and optimization to large-scale computation and artificial intelligence.
items.title_zh: 颇具影响力的计算机科学家和多产作家 Dimitri Bertsekas 名誉教授去世，享年 83 岁
items.summary_zh: Bertsekas 以其清晰优雅的写作风格而闻名，他塑造了从控制和优化到大规模计算和人工智能的领域。

items.title: Following the questions where they lead
items.summary: Assistant Professor Bailey Flanigan has arrived at complex computational methods for helping democracy thrive.
items.title_zh: 追随问题的引导
items.summary_zh: 助理教授贝利·弗拉尼根 (Bailey Flanigan) 找到了帮助民主蓬勃发展的复杂计算方法。

items.title: 3 Questions: Neural transparency and the future of AI design
items.summary: Assistant Professor Pat Pataranutaporn describes a new interface that lets everyday users glimpse inside an AI's neural network before their chatbot ever says a word.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：神经透明度和人工智能设计的未来
items.summary_zh: 助理教授帕特·帕塔拉努塔蓬 (Pat Pataranutaporn) 描述了一种新界面，可以让日常用户在聊天机器人说一句话之前就了解人工智能的神经网络内部情况。

items.title: Can AI build a jet engine? JARVIS Challenge tests role of AI copilots in tough-tech engineering
items.summary: MIT students designed, built, and tested a jet engine with AI copilots, assessing AI’s usefulness in developing high-performance aerospace systems.
items.title_zh: 人工智能可以建造喷气发动机吗？贾维斯挑战赛测试人工智能副驾驶在高难度技术工程中的作用
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的学生设计、建造并测试了带有人工智能副驾驶的喷气发动机，评估人工智能在开发高性能航空航天系统中的有用性。

items.title: How MIT students are helping to prevent cyberattacks
items.summary: Students from the MIT Cybersecurity Clinic help local governments and other vulnerable organizations defend against digital threats.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的学生如何帮助防止网络攻击
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院网络安全诊所的学生帮助地方政府和其他脆弱组织抵御数字威胁。

items.title: AI agents create virtual playgrounds to help robots get crucial training data
items.summary: “SceneSmith” system uses collaborative AI agents to create realistic 3D environments of places like kitchens, hotels, and living rooms, where robots can simulate everyday chores.
items.title_zh: 人工智能代理创建虚拟游乐场来帮助机器人获得关键的训练数据
items.summary_zh: “SceneSmith”系统使用协作式 AI 代理来创建厨房、酒店和客厅等场所的逼真 3D 环境，机器人可以在其中模拟日常家务。
